exploration_notes:
Comprehensive analysis of MergeTree storage engine architecture covering three main paths:

**Write Path**: INSERT → MergeTreeSink::consume() splits blocks by partition (MergeTreeDataWriter::splitBlockIntoParts), sorts by primary key, optionally applies optimize_on_insert merging (mergeBlock with engine-specific algorithms like ReplacingSorted, CollapsingSorted etc.), then writes a temporary part via writeTempPartImpl which creates column files (.bin), mark files (.mrk), primary index (primary.i
